[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeGrid](../../TextmodeGrid.md) / height

# Accessor: height

## Get Signature

```ts
get height(): number;
```

Total grid height in screen pixels.

This is equal to `rows * cellHeight`.

### Returns

`number`

### Example
